mapper.insert: INSERT INTO toilet_edit_requests (toilet_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{toiletId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT ter.*, t.name AS toilet_name, u.nickname FROM toilet_edit_requests ter JOIN toilets t ON ter.toilet_id = t.id LEFT JOIN users u ON ter.user_id = u.id WHERE ter.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY ter.created_at DESC

SELECT ter.*, t.name AS toilet_name, u.nickname FROM toilet_edit_requests ter JOIN toilets t ON ter.toilet_id = t.id LEFT JOIN users u ON ter.user_id = u.id WHERE ter.status = 'PENDING' AND ter.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY ter.created_at DESC
SELECT ter.*, t.name AS toilet_name, u.nickname FROM toilet_edit_requests ter JOIN toilets t ON ter.toilet_id = t.id LEFT JOIN users u ON ter.user_id = u.id WHERE ter.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE toilet_edit_requests SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
